title: Madhu Guru｜I have friends who made $10M+ and are miserable. I have friends who made that much and fou
full_text: I have friends who made $10M+ and are miserable. I have friends who made that much and found calm - they don’t need to run anymore. I have friends who made far less and are just happy. Whether something is enough is up to you. Whether you’re happy is independent of your bank account. You can want to be wealthy and still be content now. You don’t need to chase it from a place of lack and desperation. Silicon Valley treats ambition and happiness as mutually exclusive. As if wanting more means you can’t be satisfied now. That’s the trap. You can be both Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana. All opinions mine. likes=166; retweets=8; replies=8

## clean_text

I have friends who made $10M+ and are miserable. I have friends who made that much and found calm - they don’t need to run anymore. I have friends who made far less and are just happy. Whether something is enough is up to you. Whether you’re happy is independent of your bank account. You can want to be wealthy and still be content now. You don’t need to chase it from a place of lack and desperation. Silicon Valley treats ambition and happiness as mutually exclusive. As if wanting more means you can’t be satisfied now. That’s the trap. You can be both Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana. All opinions mine. likes=166; retweets=8; replies=8

## full_text

I have friends who made $10M+ and are miserable. I have friends who made that much and found calm - they don’t need to run anymore. I have friends who made far less and are just happy. Whether something is enough is up to you. Whether you’re happy is independent of your bank account. You can want to be wealthy and still be content now. You don’t need to chase it from a place of lack and desperation. Silicon Valley treats ambition and happiness as mutually exclusive. As if wanting more means you can’t be satisfied now. That’s the trap. You can be both Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana. All opinions mine. likes=166; retweets=8; replies=8
